MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R. COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-07-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT 1/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY ARNOLD EVJE PRESENT WITH PLTF. DEFT LAWRENCE OLIVER PRESENT IN PRO-PER. CASE SETTLED; TERMS NOT ON RECORD. PLTF SUBMITTED PREPARED JUDGMENT PURS TO STIP SIGNED BY DEFT; ALL PARTIES ORALLY INDICATED ACCEPTANCE OF TERMS OF SETTLEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLIVER, LAWRENCE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 SIXTH STREET, #246, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-21-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE BY 8/21/96 5PM, PLTF IS ENTITLE TO AN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR UNPAID RENT & COSTS. (SEE JUDGMENT).
